subcodes.first_line: O ye who have peace of soul! Among the divine Texts as set forth in the Most Holy Book and also in other Tablets is this
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای نفوس مطمئنه از نصوص الهیه چه در کتاب اقدس و چه در سائر الواح اینست که
subcodes.subjects: @education of children; moral education, @House of Justice, @justice and wrath of God, @laws of God; of the Kitab-i-Aqdas
